description: AGCO ATS appears to be an AGCO web platform for support, update, authorization, licensing, and aftermarket service workflows. Its public-facing site is login-gated and points users to AGCO's EDT Support Portal for access.
summary: AGCO ATS exposes one documented HTTP API at `https://secure.agco-ats.com`, described by a Swagger UI and a discovered machine-readable Swagger document, but public docs do not clearly establish the developer authentication method.
